English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State Nutrition Council records
New York Nutrition Council
2679
2 cubic feet. 1.5 cubic feet.
1939-2007. Manuscripts, Reports Minutes of meetings, membership lists, procedures of the council, Historians' reports, Executive Council Board minutes, and related records of the New York State Nutrition Council. Collection material in English 2068184
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
February 2008
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, February 2008
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Minutes of meetings, membership lists, procedures of the council, Historians' reports, Executive Council Board minutes, and related records of the New York State Nutrition Council.
Cite As:
New York State Nutrition Council records, #2679. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Minutes. Nutrition -- Societies, etc.
